business_ideas.idea: Lifestyle e-commerce by creators with 400K+ followers selling into niche passion verticals
Hodinkee-style creator platforms for fountain pens, watches, everyday carry niches
Premium directive-to-consumer businesses in automotive, tools, outdoor, fitness
Multi-product creator economy: launch one business, pivot to adjacencies with audience trust
Creator operator model: find founders/operators to run businesses while creator focuses on content

predictions.text: 100+ creator middle-class businesses will scale to $50-200M revenue in next 10 years
Video platform creators outperform Twitter/audio creators for D2C business conversion
Second Amendment (2A) creator content will build billion-dollar product ecosystems
Passionate niche audiences are more valuable than large generic audiences for monetization
